name: quill
description: Discovery stub for the Quill agent skill bundle. The actual workflow guides and prompt helpers live inside the quill CLI (`pip install quill`) and are served by `quill skills get` / `quill ask`.

skills.name: quill
skills.description: Quill CLI discovery stub. The actual workflow guides live inside the quill CLI; this stub teaches an AI agent to call `quill skills list`, `quill skills get <name>`, and `quill ask <prompt> --guided|--direct`. Use whenever the user asks a data question, wants to install / set up Quill Engine, connect a new database, load SaaS data via dlt, generate or regenerate an MDL project, enrich a project with business context, or build & deploy a shareable GenBI web app / dashboard from a project's semantic layer (Vercel / Cloudflare).
